title: Woolly Mammoth in Snowy Tundra Coloring Page
seoTitle: Woolly Mammoth in Snowy Tundra Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Detailed Woolly Mammoth walking through a snowy ice age plain with glaciers. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Woolly Mammoth lived during the Ice Age and was covered in thick shaggy fur with a layer of fat up to 3 inches thick to survive the cold.
It possessed long, curved ivory tusks up to 14 feet (4.2 meters) in length, which it used to sweep snow off the grass it ate.
It coexisted with early humans, who hunted them for meat and used their bones and tusks to build shelters and tools.
